so in this game do you run mono faction teams ever or are the multi faction ability combos the best way to go?
Really depends on the Characters
For example, GMurphy benefits more off of going pure Aequor or mixed Chaos to make the most benefit out of her Passive
On the other hand, Caro Units as a Realm are generally better off being ran Pure as they can generate both Crimson Furnace + Embryo Fusion much more consistently
With Chaos & Ultra though, you are generally given more breathing room as they are usually there to support your Carries more effectively
what do you get from running pure aequor vs mixed? just get to run more of the on-faction units?
For example, running Kath with Tinct + Clem / Horla (Premium) or Winkle / Erica (Freemium)
this is pretty relevant to me since i just started today and my roster is all aequor (here it is)
edit: oh lemme fix that

With Pure Aequor, you benefit more off of Realm Mastery which will effect the Shield affected by Tranquil Sea (White Stance) and Damage Amplication on Raging Waves (Red Stance), as well as generate more Tentacles per Turn too
Which is further raised by GMurphy's Buffs
You can get away with running Chaos, as you will still be able to benefit from Divine Aequor Realm that GMurphy has access to
Whereas with Caro /Ultra, you will not be able to receive any of those Divine Aequor Realm benefits, on top of Aequor Buffs themselves being halved further

You'll ideally want to run GMurphy together w/ Goliath, Myriam & Tulu in Arc 2 Content for the full Lemurian Buffs from her Soulforge Talent
Before then though, you can get away with running Caecus + Thais (or Faros / Sanga / Celeste) over Myriam & Tulu in Arc 1 Content

are there any substats that are generally good on Dream of Medicine set? or does it vary with the wielder?
depends on the wielder
keyflare is never bad but apart from that it depends
Usually like 10 % cr and 20% cd at least, along with some keyflare
also for future reference, what other units like DoM besides GMurphy?

Vary with the wielder, bur its mainly used on 
Fauxborn/Tawil: 10% CR, 20% Cdmg, 20% keyflare split
Corposant: Minimal cr, rest cdmg
Gdoll: Pure realm mastery/dmg amp/keyflare

Those are the only 4 you'll see run it.
Occasionally Castor will as well but it's not optimal. For him cdmg and dmg amp are all u want

If you're playing him for the counter, you do want to build crit
Critting with Shattered Halberd gives you more, since the amount of counter is directly tied to the damage it deals 
If he's your vulnerability orison stat stick, then you just build whatever your team needs, probably DR

I used this team to brute force 95% of Arc 1 Faded Legacy.
I haven't used Sanga, but in my case I'd change Celeste first for a better unit.
If Sanga is bringing good enough shields for you, I'd say keep her and get a better unit in place of Celeste, just for higher stats (Celeste has very low stats overall).
That said, since your team seems quite solid for the first chapter of the story as of now (not considering hard mode later on, that's more tricky but the team could still work), you can just consider what you need a little more. Maybe if your units are dying too much, check a more reliable support than Celeste, then Sanga after. The rest of the team is nice. You could consider Chaos units a well to get higher stats, some Death Resistance, and some overall utility.
